Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'NM' AND (bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1, 2) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 2)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/1974b96d55cade461dba77aaacd7face5cf06a30216d1f0d2466657b9ba6aea9/c2107a62-f47f-405d-bf58-336c05775271/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
